channel.title: Lebende Sprachen
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Lebende Sprachen

item.title: Multiple translation and the translator’s visibility
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0021

item.title: Das Medium barbarisieren
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0019

item.title: Relational description as pivotal to dialogical translation
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0013

item.title: Insurrection or Protest? A corpus-linguistic analysis of the news reporting by CNN and Fox News based on the January 6, 2021, events at the US Capitol
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0017

item.title: Shaping the visually impaired perception of gender through Netflix audio description of movies and series
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2023-0034

item.title: Exploring the effect of translating non-verbal elements in film subtitles
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2023-0031

item.title: Humanitarian interpreting in the context of African migrant reception in the Canary Islands
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0007

item.title: La pregunta como instrumento de retroalimentación correctiva escrita en la formación en traducción jurídica (francés-español): un estudio exploratorio
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0012

item.title: Using ChatGPT and determinologisation to enhance understanding of lung cancer information
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0020

item.title: Posedición y paridad humano-máquina en traducción automática neuronal: Un estudio empírico desde la traducción profesional
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0003

item.title: Hat man da noch Worte? – Schulung der lexikalischen Präzision im zielorientierten Fremdsprachenunterricht Deutsch für spanischsprachige Translatoren
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0006

item.title: Klaus Brinker, Steffen Pappert, Hermann Cölfen (2024): Linguistische Textanalyse – Eine Einführung in Grundbegriffe und Methoden. 10., neu bearbeitete Auflage. Berlin: Erich Schmidt Verlag. [Grundlagen der Germanistik. Bd. 29] 200 S., ISBN 978 3 503 23861 3.
item.description: Article by Sebastian Seyferth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/les-2024-0025
